# isbadip.com

> Free IP and domain reputation lookup. Check whether an IPv4 address or hostname is on public threat lists (FireHOL, Spamhaus, malware/phishing/scanner feeds) and view geo, top-1M ranking, and resolved hostnames.

## API
- Endpoint: https://api.isbadip.com/api/v1/host/{ip-or-domain}
- Method: GET
- Auth: none, free, no key required
- Response: JSON. Fields include `valid`, `malicious`, `confidence`, `threat`, `geo`, `top1m`, `resolvedIPs`, `hostnames`.

## Examples
- https://api.isbadip.com/api/v1/host/8.8.8.8
- https://api.isbadip.com/api/v1/host/example.com

## Notes
Data is aggregated from public threat-intel sources. No personal data is collected from queries.
